ai-recruiter.spec.js
01-A Valid login reaches dashboard
01-B Invalid credentials shows error
01-C Unauthenticated access redirects to login
01-D Session persists across page refresh
02-A All nav items present
02-B Chat input and Send button visible
02-C Recruiter agent shows online badge
02-D Clear chat button present
02-E AI billing warning banner check
02-F Prompts history panel renders
05-A Clear chat removes conversation history
05-B After clear, new query works normally
06-A Sending query adds it to history panel
06-B History shows result count and timestamp
06-C Clear history button clears all entries
06-D Clicking history entry replays query
07-A Candidates page loads
07-B Open jobs page loads
07-C Analytics page loads
07-D Data sources page loads
07-E Active AI Recruiter nav item is highlighted
08-A Banner shows Update billing link
08-B Dismiss button closes the banner
08-C Billing link navigates to Settings
08-D Keyword fallback works when AI is out-of-credit
09-A Tab key navigates interactive elements
09-B Enter key submits the message
09-C Page renders on 1280x720 viewport
09-D Page renders on mobile viewport 375x812

candidates.spec.js

Search partial name — Pad — returns results
Search case insensitive — PADMA vs padma same results
Search single character — P — returns results

Source filter — select Ceipal and results update

Status filter — check available options
Combined search and filter — Padma + Ceipal
Reset all filters — results return to default

Candidate profile shows key details

Export button triggers file download
Bulk import button opens import interface

Pagination controls present at bottom
Sort control is present and functional
